llm_operation.reason: MindSpore ReduceMin requires explicit axis and keep_dims parameters; Paddle's paddle.min defaults to reducing all axes, but MindSpore's op(x) without axis reduces all dims only if axis=() or omitted, yet its callable signature requires axis arg in practice. Also dtype float64 may have limited support in older MindSpore versions; use float32 for compatibility.
